Summary: As a QA Analyst,  I want to validate all calculations and dashboards, so that data accuracy is ensured
As a Business Analyst,  I want to prepare insights and recommendations, so that stakeholders can take business decisions.
As a Business User,  I want an interactive dashboard, so that I can visualize sales and profit insights.
As a Business Analyst,  I want to analyze region-wise sales and profit, so that I can identify underperforming regions.
As a Business Analyst,  I want to analyze the impact of discount on profit, so that I can identify margin leakage.
As a Business Analyst,  I want to analyze category-wise performance, so that I can identify profitable and loss-making categories.
As a Business Analyst,  I want to analyze total sales and profit across the dataset, so that I can identify overall business performance.
